ham.subject: Your Flipkart Order #1234567890 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! Your order #1234567890 has been processed and is now on its way.

Order Details:
• Order ID: 1234567890
• Items: 1x "Xiaomi Redmi Note 11" (₹12,999), 2x "Samsung 32" TV Remote" (₹799 each)
• Total: ₹15,797
• Shipping Address: 12, Green Avenue, Sector 15, Noida, UP
• Delivery Date: 23 Apr 2026
• Tracking Number: FLK1234567890

You can track your shipment using the link below:
<URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email.

Happy Shopping!

Best regards,
Flipkart Customer Support Team

spam.subject: Ticket #56789 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

Our system has detected unusual activity on your account and an IT support ticket (Ticket #56789) has been opened for immediate attention.

To verify your identity and prevent your account from being suspended, please click the link below and enter your login details:
<URL>

You have only 5 minutes to complete this verification. Failure to do so may result in temporary suspension of your account.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Support Team
